_README: Golden retrieval set for the SYSK RAG eval harness. Each item maps a natural-language question to one or more acceptable episode filenames (a hit = ANY listed episode appears in top-k). Questions are phrased to avoid copying the episode title verbatim, so they test semantic retrieval rather than exact title matching. Edit freely: add your own real-usage questions, and keep filenames exactly as they appear in ./transcripts. Starter set drafted from the actual archive; 7 entries marked 'formerly_missing' are the accented-title episodes that were re-indexed with ASCII-safe IDs.
